sourceMovie.title: Nomadland
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Nomadland works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Me Before You
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Nomadland clicked for you, Me Before You (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: American Psycho
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Nomadland clicked for you, American Psycho (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Nomadland?
faq.answer: Try Me Before You, American Psycho, The Pursuit of Happyness—each shares DNA with Nomadland while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Nomadland?
faq.answer: Nomadland (2021) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Nomadland worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
